method: full 117-component sweep (8 agents) + missed-15 + thematic canonicalization (11 groups)

hardcoded_canonical.law: Кодекс о браке (супружестве) и семье РК, ст. 139
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: 1 ребёнок = 1/4 дохода = 25%. Structural Code share, current for 2026 (confirmed egov.kz / ст.139).

hardcoded_canonical.law: Кодекс о браке (супружестве) и семье РК, ст. 139
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Raw captured as fraction '1/3'; same constant expressed as percent = 33.3%. 2 детей = 1/3 дохода. No value conflict — only fraction-vs-percent encoding.

hardcoded_canonical.law: Кодекс о браке (супружестве) и семье РК, ст. 139
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: 3+ детей = 1/2 дохода = 50%. Distinct constant from 1-child/2-children shares; not merged.

hardcoded_canonical.law: Закон РК о государственной адресной социальной помощи (АСП)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Two naming variants of the same ASP per-child bonus (children 1–6 yrs) = 1.5 МРП; identical value 1.5, merged. Multiplier is structural; absolute KZT amount tracks МРП annually.

hardcoded_canonical.law: Закон РК о государственной адресной социальной помощи (АСП)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Two naming variants of the same threshold: черта бедности не ниже 70% ПМ. Both =70%, merged. Distinct from the 35%-of-median threshold (different base — ПМ vs median income), so NOT merged with it.

hardcoded_canonical.law: Закон РК о государственной адресной социальной помощи (АСП)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Two naming variants of the same threshold: черта бедности = 35% медианного дохода. Both =35%, merged. Separate real-world constant from the 70%-of-ПМ threshold (different base).

hardcoded_canonical.law: Закон РК о государственных пособиях семьям, имеющим детей
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Единовременное пособие на рождение 1–3 ребёнка = 38 МРП. Distinct from the 4th+ child amount (63 МРП); not merged. Multiplier structural; KZT tracks МРП.

hardcoded_canonical.law: Закон РК о государственных пособиях семьям, имеющим детей
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Единовременное пособие на 4-го и последующего ребёнка = 63 МРП. Distinct from 1–3 child amount (38 МРП).

hardcoded_canonical.law: Закон РК об обязательном социальном страховании / ГФСС (пособие по уходу за ребёнком до 1.5 лет)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Raw captured as factor 0.4 (CHILDCARE_RATE=0.4); canonicalized as rate 40%. Same constant, decimal-vs-percent encoding.

hardcoded_canonical.law: Закон РК о государственных пособиях семьям, имеющим детей (ежемесячное пособие по уходу до 1.5 лет)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Single table of per-birth-order monthly childcare amounts in МРП; one source, no conflict. Multipliers structural; KZT tracks МРП.

hardcoded_canonical.law: ГФСС РК — единовременная выплата по беременности и родам (126 дней / 30)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Lump-sum maternity coefficient 4.2 = 126 calendar days / 30. Structural derivation, single value.

hardcoded_canonical.law: Закон РК об обязательном социальном страховании / ГФСС — предел дохода для исчисления выплат
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Income cap for maternity benefit calculation = 7 МЗП. The multiplier (7) is structural; the absolute cap (7×85000=595000) changes annually with МЗП. Same 7-МЗП object-cap concept as the СО income cap but kept separate as it is captured for the maternity calculator.

hardcoded_canonical.law: ЕНТ — НАО «Национальный центр тестирования» (структура 20+10+10+50+50)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Max ЕНТ score = 140. Regulated test parameter set by НАО/МОН (year tagged 2024); changes occasionally by ministry decision. Single value.

hardcoded_canonical.law: Закон РК об образовании — ГОНС (госпремия по образовательному накопительному вкладу), макс. база премирования
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: ГОНС max yearly premium base = 100 МРП (≈432 500 ₸/год). Structural program parameter; KZT tracks МРП. Single value.

hardcoded_canonical.law: Закон РК об образовании — ГОНС, минимальный первоначальный взнос
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: ГОНС min initial deposit = 3 МРП (≈12 975 ₸). Structural; KZT tracks МРП.

hardcoded_canonical.law: ГОНС — ставка госпремии для льготных категорий
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Priority-category ГОНС premium = 7% (льготные категории). Distinct from the regular 5% rate; not merged. Coincidental numeric match with 7-20-25 mortgage rate but different real-world constant.

hardcoded_canonical.law: ГОНС — ставка госпремии для обычных категорий
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Regular-category ГОНС premium = 5%. Distinct from the priority 7% rate; not merged.

hardcoded_canonical.law: Гос. ипотечная программа «7-20-25» (АО «Казахстанский фонд устойчивости», НБ РК)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Program nominal rate = 7%. Confirmed active in 2026 at 7% (kfu.kz / krisha.kz, new tranche from Jan 2026). Same 7% value appears in MortgageCalculator and OtbasyBankCalculator — consistent, not a conflict. The '20' (down payment) and '25' (term) are separate parameters.

hardcoded_canonical.law: Гос. ипотечная программа «7-20-25» — минимальный первоначальный взнос
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Minimum down payment = 20%. Distinct parameter of the same program (not merged with rate or term).

hardcoded_canonical.law: Гос. ипотечная программа «7-20-25» — максимальный срок
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Max term = 25 years. Distinct parameter of the program. Numeric coincidence with the 25M loan cap below — different unit/constant.

hardcoded_canonical.law: Гос. ипотечная программа «7-20-25» — лимит займа для Алматы/Астаны
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Max loan for Almaty/Astana = 25 000 000 ₸ (regions = 15M, per note). Distinct parameter of the program.

hardcoded_canonical.law: АО «Отбасы банк» (hcsbk.kz) — программа «Баспана хит»
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Баспана хит rate = 5% (term 25y, down 20%, max 30M). Distinct Otbasy product from Баспана жас (2%) and Отау (7%); not merged.

hardcoded_canonical.law: АО «Отбасы банк» — программа «Баспана жас» (молодёжная)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Баспана жас rate = 2% (down 10%, max 18M). Distinct product; not merged.

hardcoded_canonical.law: АО «Отбасы банк» — программа «Отау»
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Отау rate = 7% (raised 5%→7% in 2026 per note; down 20%, max 36M Астана/Алматы). Distinct Otbasy product. Numeric match with 7-20-25 and GONS-priority 7% is coincidental — different constants.

hardcoded_canonical.law: АРРФР РК — предельный коэффициент долговой нагрузки (ПДН/DTI)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Raw used as factor 0.5 (requiredIncome = payment/0.5); canonicalized as 50% DTI cap. Mirrors the regulatory ПДН ≤50% limit. Decimal-vs-percent encoding of the same constant.

hardcoded_canonical.law: Кодекс о браке (супружестве) и семье РК — равные доли супругов
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Raw captured as factor 0.5 (default 50/50 split); canonicalized as 50%. Structural Code share. Distinct from marital_share_with_children (0.55/55%).

hardcoded_canonical.law: Кодекс о браке (супружестве) и семье РК — отступление от равенства долей в интересах детей
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Raw captured as factor 0.55 (55/45 when children stay with one parent); canonicalized as 55%. Distinct real-world constant from the equal 50% share — NOT merged. Decimal-vs-percent encoding only.

hardcoded_canonical.law: Закон РК об обязательном социальном страховании / ГФСС — объект исчисления СО ограничен 7 МЗП
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Two naming variants of the same СО income-object cap = 7 МЗП (595 000 ₸) — merged, identical value 7. Multiplier structural; absolute cap tracks МЗП annually.

hardcoded_canonical.law: ГФСС РК — коэффициент замещения дохода для пособия по утрате работы
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Income replacement coefficient = 40%. Single value (source lists it twice from one calculator); structural. Same numeric as childcare 40% but a different real-world constant — not merged.

hardcoded_canonical.law: ГФСС РК — минимальный стаж участия для права на пособие по утрате работы
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Minimum participation period = 6 months. Single value (listed twice from one calculator); structural eligibility threshold.

hardcoded_canonical.law: ГФСС РК (2026) — коэффициент стажа участия
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Two encodings of the same staj-coefficient table: one omits the explicit '<6m:0' band, the other includes it; otherwise identical (0.7→1.0 by band, +0.02/yr beyond 6y capped at 1.3). Same table, different textual representation — no value conflict.

hardcoded_canonical.law: Социальный кодекс РК, ст. 84 (социальная выплата на случай потери работы); администратор — ГФСС
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Two encodings of the SAME tiered table differ only in cosmetic notation for the top tier: '5y+' vs '5+y' (both mean 'service of 5 years or more'). After normalization the schedules are byte-for-byte identical (6-12m->1, 1-2y->2, 2-3y->3, 3-4y->4, 4-5y->5, 5+y->6 months). No value disagreement, so not a VALUE_CONFLICT; both variants already encode the correct 2026 schedule.

hardcoded_canonical.law: Закон РК О восстановлении платёжеспособности и банкротстве граждан (внесудебное банкротство)
ЕТТ ЕАЭС (единый таможенный тариф)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Base EAEU customs duty rate for a vehicle (<=7 years). Distinct from the old-vehicle rate (25%) and the large-engine surcharge (5%).

hardcoded_canonical.law: ЕТТ ЕАЭС (единый таможенный тариф)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Higher customs duty applied when vehicle age > 7 years. Different constant from the 15% base rate.

hardcoded_canonical.law: ЕТТ ЕАЭС (единый таможенный тариф)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Additive surcharge when engine volume > 3000 cc; not a standalone duty rate.

hardcoded_canonical.law: ЕАЭС таможенные правила (порог возраста ТС)
ТК ЕАЭС / постановление о таможенных сборах РК
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Captured as 0.4 (percent) which equals the code constant 0.004 (fraction). Same constant, percent encoding chosen as canonical (0.4% of customs value).

hardcoded_canonical.law: Решение Совета ЕЭК / ТК ЕАЭС (беспошлинный лимит стоимости посылки, EUR)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Duty-free parcel value threshold in EUR (not KZT/MRP); EAEU Council periodically revises.

hardcoded_canonical.law: ТК ЕАЭС (беспошлинный лимит веса посылки, кг)
ТК ЕАЭС (пошлина 15% от стоимости сверх лимита)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Parcel value-excess duty rate; numerically 15% but a different rule from the vehicle 15% base duty — not merged.

hardcoded_canonical.law: ТК ЕАЭС (2 EUR за кг сверх лимита веса)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: EUR-per-kg weight-excess duty; higher of value/weight duty is applied.

hardcoded_canonical.law: ст. 610 НК РК (госпошлина по имущественному иску, физлица)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Same 1% property-claim court duty for individuals, written as 1 (percent) in CourtFee and as 0.01 (fraction) in PropertyDivision/Divorce. Unified to 1%.

hardcoded_canonical.law: ст. 610 НК РК (госпошлина по имущественному иску, юрлица)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Legal-entity property-claim rate (3%); deliberately NOT merged with the 1% individual rate.

hardcoded_canonical.law: ст. 610 НК РК (минимум госпошлины по имущественному иску)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Floor of the percentage-based property-claim court fee (0.5 МРП), captured under two snake_case names in PropertyDivision and Divorce. Merged.

hardcoded_canonical.law: ст. 610 НК РК (госпошлина по неимущественному иску, физлица)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Flat non-property claim fee for individuals (0.5 МРП). Shares the value 0.5 МРП with the property-claim minimum but is a different rule — kept separate.

hardcoded_canonical.law: ст. 610 НК РК (предельная госпошлина для физлиц)
ст. 610 НК РК (предельная госпошлина для юрлиц)

hardcoded_canonical.value: divorce:0.3/0; alimony:1/0; labor:0.5/2; administrative:2/5; bankruptcy:50/100; arbitration:10/20; corporate:0/15; inheritance:3/0; consumer:1/0; housing:2/5 (МРП individual/legal)
hardcoded_canonical.law: ст. 610 НК РК (неимущественные иски — таблица госпошлин)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Full non-property court-fee table (МРП for individual/legal; 0 = exempt). Kept as one table constant.

hardcoded_canonical.law: ст. 610 НК РК (иск о расторжении брака в суде)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Matches the 'divorce' individual cell (0.3 МРП) of the non-property table; surfaced separately by DivorceCalculator.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК (расторжение брака в ЗАГС по взаимному согласию)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Administrative (ZAGS) divorce duty, distinct from the 0.3 МРП court divorce duty.

hardcoded_canonical.law: пп.4 ст.616 НК РК (истец по алиментам освобождён от госпошлины)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Statutory exemption (0 МРП), not a missing/zeroed value.

hardcoded_canonical.law: ст. 610 НК РК (раздел имущества — имущественный иск, физлица)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: MERGED INTO gov_duty_court_property_individual_rate (same 1% individual property-claim duty, fraction 0.01 in Divorce). Listed there as alias; not a separate constant.

hardcoded_canonical.value: triple001/007=170; triple111/777=150; pair100=100; mirror010=50; tens=30; sequential=20; standard=2 (МРП)

ГК РК (супружеская доля совместно нажитого имущества)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Structural 50% spousal share of joint property; a share factor, not a duty/fee.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК (госпошлина/нотариальный сбор за свидетельство о праве на наследство)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Note labels it a notary cost estimate, but it maps to the per-heir inheritance-certificate state duty (1 МРП); treated as the regulatory constant.

hardcoded_canonical.law: Закон РК О микрофинансовой деятельности (лимит регулярного МФО-займа)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Regulatory/product ceiling on a standard MFO installment loan (3,000,000 ₸). Flat KZT cap, not МРП-indexed.

hardcoded_canonical.law: ст. 62 КоАП РК (срок давности по административному взысканию)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Same 1-year admin-fine limitation captured twice (unit 'factor' vs 'years', different snake_case). Merged; canonical unit = years.

hardcoded_canonical.law: ст. 71 УК РК (срок давности, преступления небольшой тяжести)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Same 2-year criminal (minor offence) limitation captured twice (factor vs years). Merged.

hardcoded_canonical.law: ст. 9 КоБС РК (срок исковой давности по семейным спорам)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Same 3-year family-law limitation captured twice (factor vs years). Merged. Shares value 3 years with the general civil limitation but is a different statute (КоБС ст.9 vs ГК ст.178) — kept separate from it.

hardcoded_canonical.law: ст. 178 ГК РК (общий срок исковой давности)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Same 3-year general civil limitation (covers contract/loan/damage) captured twice (factor vs years). Merged. Distinct statute from the 3-year family limitation.

hardcoded_canonical.law: ст. 1072 ГК РК (срок принятия наследства)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Same 6-month inheritance-acceptance period captured twice (factor vs months). Merged.

hardcoded_canonical.law: ст. 160 ТК РК (срок обращения по индивидуальному трудовому спору)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Same 3-month labor-dispute limitation captured twice (factor vs months). Merged.

hardcoded_canonical.law: ст. 240 ГК РК (приобретательная давность)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Same 10-year acquisitive-prescription period captured twice (factor vs years). Merged.

НК РК ст.615 (госпошлина за регистрацию ТС)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Raw table 'age<=1yr:0.25 MRP; 2-3yr:50 MRP; >3yr:500 MRP' conflates two distinct levies and cites the wrong article ('ст.553 НК РК'). The vehicle-registration STATE DUTY is a flat 0.25 MRP regardless of age (НК РК ст.615) — confirmed by the parallel constant gov_duty_vehicle_registration_mrp = 0.25 MRP citing ст.615 in duties_fines__1. The 50 MRP / 500 MRP age tiers are NOT the registration duty; they map to the separate first-registration / utilization-fee regime on older imported vehicles, which is a distinct charge with its own base, and ст.553 is not the registration-duty article. CORRECT for 2026: registration state duty = 0.25 MRP (~1,081 ₸ at MRP=4325), flat. The age-graduated 50/500 MRP must not be presented as the ст.553/registration duty.

Закон РК «Об обязательном социальном медицинском страховании» (ст. 28); ставка ВОСМС работника 2% в 2026
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Same rate captured as percent number 2 (6 calculators: Alimony/Overtime/Salary/SalaryReverse/SecondJob/Severance) and as factor 0.02 (IncomeTaxCalculator). 2% == 0.02 — one constant, two encodings. Canonical as percent = 2. Verified: ВОСМС employee rate stayed at 2% in 2026 (planned increase not enacted).

hardcoded_canonical.law: Закон РК «Об обязательном социальном медицинском страховании» — предельный объект исчисления ВОСМС повышен с 10 до 20 МЗП с 01.01.2026
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Two naming variants of the same constant (vosms_max_base_mzp across 6 calcs, vosms_max_base_mzp_multiplier in IncomeTaxCalculator), identical value 20 МЗП. Verified correct for 2026: cap raised from 10 МЗП to 20 МЗП effective 01.01.2026; at МЗП=85,000 monthly cap = 1,700,000 ₸ → max employee ВОСМС 34,000 ₸/mo. The 20× multiplier is a recent structural change but the resulting ₸ cap re-indexes annually with МЗП, so change_frequency=annual.

hardcoded_canonical.law: Закон РК «Об обязательном социальном медицинском страховании» — взнос ВОСМС ИП/частной практики «за себя» = 5% × 1.4 МЗП
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Two naming variants of the same constant (vosms_self_fixed_2026 in RentalIncomeTaxCalculator, vosms_self_fixed_monthly in IPSimplifiedCalculator), identical value 5,950 ₸/mo. Verified correct for 2026: fixed ВОСМС 'за себя' = 5% of 1.4×МЗП = 5% × 119,000 = 5,950 ₸/mo; unchanged vs 2025 because МЗП held at 85,000. Derived from МЗП → recomputed annually, change_frequency=annual.

hardcoded_canonical.law: Норма учебной нагрузки педагога — 18 часов/неделю (Закон РК «О статусе педагога» / приказ МП РК)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Single value 18 h/week, no duplicate or variant; structural teaching-load norm, not a money figure.

PropertyTaxCalculator holds the full 16-step progressive table; LuxuryTaxCalculator re-encodes ONLY its top tier as three separate constants — threshold 450,000,000 ₸, fixed base 2,946,600 ₸, excess rate 2% — which match the top bracket exactly (>450M: base 2946600 @2.0%). Not a value conflict: identical numbers, just one calculator isolating the highest bracket and relabeling it 'налог на роскошь / недвижимость'.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК — налог на роскошь (акциз) на дорогостоящие авто
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Captured as factor 0.1; canonicalized to 10 percent (rate). Single value, encoding-only normalization.

Закон РК Об обязательном страховании ГПО владельцев ТС (ОГПО ВТС)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Same base ОГПО premium (1.9 МРП) in CarTransferCalculator (year blank) and InsuranceCalculator (year 2026). Identical value; only name and year-tag differ. Expressed in МРП so the ₸ amount reindexes annually.

hardcoded_canonical.value: АРФР per-region table eff. 01.01.2026: kyzylorda:1.85; zhambyl:1.74; turkestan:1.69; shymkent:1.61; astana:1.44; almaty-obl:1.44; zhetysu:1.20; zko:1.19; karaganda:1.18; kostanay:1.11; akmola:1.08; aktobe:1.02; ulytau:0.99; pavlodar:0.82; abay:0.80; mangystau:0.79; vko:0.72; almaty-city:0.71; sko:0.67; atyrau:0.48
hardcoded_canonical.law: Закон РК Об ОГПО ВТС; территориальные коэффициенты, утв. АРФР с 01.01.2026
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Same real-world constant (ОГПО territorial coefficient) at conflicting values. CarTransferCalculator uses an obsolete coarse 2-bucket scheme: Almaty/Astana=2.96, other regions=1.86. InsuranceCalculator uses the detailed АРФР per-region table effective 01.01.2026 where Astana=1.44 and Almaty city=0.71 (split into city vs oblast). The numbers are irreconcilable (2.96/1.86 are pre-reform city-pair values; the 2026 reform lowered and regionalized them). CORRECT FOR 2026: the per-region АРФР table (astana 1.44, almaty-city 0.71, almaty-obl 1.44, atyrau 0.48, ...). The CarTransfer 2.96/1.86 pair is stale and should be retired.

hardcoded_canonical.conflict: ipn_rate captured both 10 (percent) and 0.1 (decimal factor in IncomeTaxCalculator) for the same 10% rate; ipn_rate_individual_rental (rental income) and ipn_rate_vehicle_sale (gain on vehicle held <1yr) apply the same ст.320 base 10% rate. Canonical = 10%. Kept separate from the 15% high rate.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК ст. 320 (прогрессивная шкала ИПН с 2026)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Encoded as 15 (percent) in most calculators and 0.15 (factor) in IncomeTaxCalculator — same constant. This is the 2026 progressive top bracket applied above 8500 MRP/year; a genuinely distinct constant from the 10% base rate, so not merged with it.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК ст. 320 (порог прогрессии ИПН, 8500 МРП/год)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: All three sources agree on 8500 MRP/year (= 36,762,500 KZT at 2026 MRP; monthly = /12). Threshold above which the 15% rate applies — introduced with the 2026 progressive reform, hence occasional.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК ст. 346/403 (стандартный личный вычет по ИПН)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Same deduction expressed two ways: 30 MRP/month (ст.346, older calculators) and 360 MRP/year (ст.403, 2026 calculators). 30*12 = 360, so identical constant in different time bases. Canonical given as 360 MRP/year. KZT value tracks MRP reindexation, so annual.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК ст. 404 (вычет 5000 МРП/год — инвалиды 1-2 гр. и др.)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Both sources agree: 5000 MRP/year. KZT value moves with MRP, so annual.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК ст. 404 (вычет 882 МРП/год — инвалиды 3 гр. и др.)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Both sources agree: 882 MRP/year. KZT value moves with MRP, so annual.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК ст. 313 (КПН, общеустановленный режим)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: corporate_general_regime_tax_rate (FranchisePayback, written as 0.2 logic) and kpn_rate (BusinessROI, CorporateIncomeTax, CryptoTax, MarginMarkup) are the same general 20% corporate income tax. Both 20%, so clean.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК (спецрежим сельхозтоваропроизводителей, пониженный КПН)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Reduced 10% КПН for agricultural producers — a distinct corporate regime, not merged with the 20% general rate or the 10% ИПН base rate.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК (освобождение организаций социальной сферы по КПН)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: 0% КПН for qualifying social-sphere organizations — distinct exemption, kept separate.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК ст. 645/646 (КПН у источника — дивиденды/роялти нерезидентам)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: 15% withholding on dividends/royalties to non-residents. Although numerically 15 like the ИПН high rate, it is a different tax (КПН у источника, ст.645/646) and must NOT be merged with ipn_high_rate_2026.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК ст. 687 (СНР на основе упрощённой декларации, 4% с оборота с 01.01.2026)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Five entries for the same 2026 simplified regime (упрощёнка): encoded as 0.04 factor (ip_simplified_ipn_rate, IPSimplified) and 4 percent elsewhere. The 2026 reform set the rate to 4% of turnover and abolished the separate social tax on this regime; hence occasional (reform-driven). Distinct from the розничный налог which is also 4%.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК ст. 683 (лимит дохода СНР упрощёнки, 300 000 МРП/полугодие)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: All three agree on 300000 MRP per half-year as the upper income limit for the simplified regime. (Source law strings cited ст.715/683 inconsistently; the income limit for упрощёнка sits in the СНР chapter — does not affect the value.) KZT equivalent tracks MRP, so annual.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК (розничный налог, 4% от дохода)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: retail_tax_rate and snr_retail_tax_rate are the same розничный налог at 4%. Both 4%, so clean. Kept separate from snr_simplified_rate: same numeric 4% but a genuinely different regime (retail tax vs simplified-declaration tax) with different eligibility and base.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК ст. 685 (СНР на основе патента, 1% = 50% ИПН + 50% СО)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Patent regime rate 1% of income (split 50% ИПН / 50% социальные отчисления). Single source, single value.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК ст. 683 (лимит дохода для патента, 3528 МРП/полугодие)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Patent income ceiling 3528 MRP/half-year. KZT equivalent tracks MRP, so annual.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК ст. 422 (НДС, 16% с 2026)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: VAT raised to 16% in the 2026 tax reform (used as 0.16 in CustomsClearance/ElectricityBill). Reform-driven change, hence occasional.

hardcoded_canonical.law: Закон РК о республиканском бюджете на 2026 (МЗП)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Minimum wage (МЗП) = 85,000 KZT for 2026, set in the annual budget law. Indexed/reset yearly, so annual.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК ст. 244 (необлагаемый предел расходов на проживание в командировке, 12 МРП/сутки)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Statutory 12 MRP/day tax-free accommodation limit on business trips (excess is taxable). This is a real legal limit, not a market/example value. KZT equivalent tracks MRP, so annual.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК ст. 537 (акциз — крепкий алкоголь, ₸ за литр безводного спирта)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Specific excise 2805 KZT per liter of anhydrous spirit (vodka/cognac). Excise schedules in ст.537 are revised on a multi-year/periodic basis, so occasional.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК ст. 537 (акциз — пиво, ₸/литр)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Beer excise 99 KZT/liter. Periodic schedule revision, occasional.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК ст. 537 (акциз — сигареты, ₸ за 1000 шт, специфическая ставка)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Cigarette specific excise 18051 KZT per 1000 sticks. Periodic schedule revision, occasional.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК ст. 537 (акциз — сигары, ₸/шт)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Cigar excise 825 KZT/unit. Periodic schedule revision, occasional.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК ст. 537 (акциз — нагреваемый табак, ₸ за 1000 шт)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Heated-tobacco excise 11230 KZT per 1000 units. Periodic schedule revision, occasional.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК ст. 537 (акциз — вино/игристое, ₸/литр)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Wine/sparkling excise 38 KZT/liter. Periodic schedule revision, occasional.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК 2026 (специальный необлагаемый минимум по выигрышам не предусмотрен)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Value 0 is a correct legal fact: in 2026 there is no special tax-free minimum for gambling/casino winnings (they are taxed in full as income). Not an estimate — it reflects the absence of a statutory exemption.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК ст. 341/401 (отмена 90% уменьшения ИПН для дохода <=25 МРП с 2026)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Boolean policy flag (hasNinetyPercentReduction=false): the 90% ИПН reduction for income <=25 MRP was abolished from 2026. Reform-driven, occasional. Value kept as the captured boolean 'false'.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК (акциз/налог на роскошь — яхты и самолёты, 10% от стоимости)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Captured as 0.1 factor; canonical expressed as 10% (rate). 10% of value on yachts/aircraft above the MRP threshold.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК (порог для налога на роскошь — яхты/самолёты, 24000 МРП)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Threshold 24000 MRP above which the luxury rate applies. KZT equivalent tracks MRP, so annual.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК ст. 331 (освобождение от ИПН при владении >1 года — жильё/земля/авто)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Minimum ownership of 1 year for ИПН exemption on sale of residential property/land/vehicle (commercial always taxable). Structural rule, value 1 (year), rare.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК ст. 687 (СНР на основе упрощённой декларации)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Three naming variants of ONE constant — the simplified-regime (СНР упрощёнка) tax rate, 4% of turnover. All three carry value 4 (percent). usn_simplified_tax_rate's law text describes the pre-2026 composition '3% ИПН + 1% соц = 4%', but for 2026 the social tax on the simplified regime is abolished and the rate is a flat 4% ИПН/КПН on revenue (akimat may vary ±50%); the captured value 4 is correct. tax_simplified_rate has empty year but is the same 2026 constant. No value conflict.

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК ст. 685 (СНР на основе патента)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Distinct from the simplified-regime 4% constant — this is the patent SNR rate, 1% of revenue (composed 50% ИПН + 50% СО). Captured with empty year but is a long-standing structural regime rate, valid for 2026. Not merged with simplified (genuinely different regime).

hardcoded_canonical.law: НК РК ст. 331 (освобождение от ИПН прироста стоимости ТС при владении не менее 1 года)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Distinct constant — ownership holding period (12 months / 1 year) above which a vehicle sale is exempt from ИПН on the value gain. Not a tax rate; kept separate from the rate constants. Structural rule, value 12 valid for 2026.

hardcoded_canonical.law: Закон РК «О республиканском бюджете на 2026 год» (МРП)
hardcoded_canonical.conflict: Same МРП constant captured two ways: a scalar (mrp = 4325) and a historical year-table (mrp_by_year_table). The 2026 anchor is identical in both (2026 = 4325), so no value conflict. The table additionally carries the prior-year series for InflationCalculator: 2015:1982; 2016:2121; 2017:2269; 2018:2405; 2019:2525; 2020:2651; 2021:2917; 2022:3063 (3180 from 2H); 2023:3450; 2024:3692; 2025:3932; 2026:4325. МРП is reset yearly in the republican budget law (hence annual). Canonical 2026 value = 4325 ₸.
